creator: hubert.tournier@gmail.com
text:
The Web page at "https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/INDEX" incorrectly states that the 13th field of the /usr/ports/INDEX-xx files is the "www site" information for a port, although this information is located in the 10th field.

As a side note, my pysec2vuxml tool (https://github.com/HubTou/pysec2vuxml) might be listed among the "Tools that read INDEX":

"pysec2vuxml|Mass checking FreeBSD Python packages ports for PYSEC vulnerabilities and reporting in FreeBSD VuXML|"

Best regards,
